text:
After today's system updates (pkg), several applications that I had installed disappeared, and so : Signal Communicator, Visual Studio Code . The problem is that their packages have also disappeared from the repository and I have nowhere to install them from, and I need them.
I will ask for guidance on how I should solve the problem presented.
System version: 13.1-RELEASE-p7
